title: polypodium blumeanum
intro: Polypodium blumeanum, also known as the Himalayan polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium blumeanum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Polypodium blumeanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
